title: elymus caninus var. behmii
intro: Elymus caninus var. behmii, also known as Blue Wild Rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus caninus var. behmii include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
